$comment: Accessibility violation budget (#398, ADR-0001). A RATCHET: entries only shrink. This file is the honest list of KNOWN axe violations on the audited surfaces — every surface not listed here has an implicit budget of ZERO, so a new violation anywhere fails the gate without anyone having to remember to add it. Counts are keyed by axe RULE ID, never totalled: a bare total would let a surface swap one rule for another at the same count and stay 'within budget', hiding a fresh regression behind existing debt. Runtime enforcement lives in .storybook/test-runner.ts (per story) and tests/e2e/a11y.spec.ts (per flow): a surface over its budget on any rule is a regression, and a surface UNDER budget also fails, demanding the number be tightened. Both lanes also record which ids they audited so scripts/check-a11y-budget.mjs --visited can fail orphaned entries. That script validates shape, path existence, and that every entry names the issue that owns the fix. Drop a rule when it reaches zero; delete the entry when its last rule goes; never raise one.
